text_anchors: The navigation menu items are missing from the top of the header.
The desktop navigation menu is rendered but appears completely transparent, making all navigation items invisible to the user.
Users cannot navigate to different product sections like Keyboards, Keycaps, Switches, or Custom Build because the navigation menu is not visible on the screen.
The product thumbnails look squished together with no spacing between them.
The thumbnail grid has zero spacing between images, causing them to display directly adjacent to each other without any gaps.
It is difficult to distinguish individual thumbnail images and they are hard to click on because they are rendered touching each other without separation.
The star ratings look strange and appear to be stacked on top of each other.
The rating stars are overlapping due to negative spacing applied to the container, making them appear layered on top of each other instead of side-by-side.
The star rating is difficult to read because the stars are rendered on top of each other instead of displayed horizontally, making the rating unclear.
